met any of the three opioid-related sub-Indicators as of the end of the calendar year. 
Beneficiaries who were identified as meeting the criteria for any of the following, also meet the 
criteria for this overarching indicator: OUD_DX_MEDICARE, OUD_HOSP_MEDICARE, or 
OUD_MAT_MEDICARE. 

SHORT NAME: OUD_ANY_MEDICARE 

LONG NAME: OUD_ANY_MEDICARE 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = Beneficiary did not meet claims criteria or have sufficient fee-for-service (FFS) coverage
